title: Yôtô monogatari: hana no Yoshiwara hyakunin-giri
actors: Chiezô Kataoka, Yaeko Mizutani, Isao Kimura
plot: A successful textile industrialist from the provinces, beloved by his employees for his kindness, cannot find a wife because of a disfiguring birthmark on his face. Even the courtesans in Yoshiwara refuse to entertain him, until i...
